title: avenula dahurica
intro: Avenula dahurica, also known as Dahurian wildrye, is a perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Avenula dahurica include reducing fever, alleviating coughs and respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems, making it a popular herbal remedy in Eastern medicine. Avenula dahurica can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine to make medicinal wines and powders.
